errors.duplicate: An entry with this name already exists.

recording.title: New recording
recording.trustBadgeHint: Audio, transcript and search index stay on your Olares box. No cloud upload, no third parties.
recording.phaseIdle: Tap the microphone to start the recording.
recording.phaseDeniedHint: Please allow Insilo to access your microphone in the browser settings.
recording.phaseUnsupportedHint: Please use a recent Chrome or Safari browser.

meeting.listEmpty: No recordings yet. Use "Record" to start your first meeting.
meeting.processingHint: The recording is being transcribed. This view updates automatically.
meeting.notFoundHint: This recording does not exist or has been deleted.

tags.sectionHint: Mark meetings with thematic tags to find them later — e.g. "Client Müller", "Q2 strategy" or "Sales pipeline". In the archive you can combine multiple tags as a filter.
tags.noneYet: No tags yet. Use "New tag" to create your first — e.g. "Client Müller" or "Q2 strategy".
tags.duplicate: A tag with this name already exists.

einstellungen.title: Settings
einstellungen.intro: Connect Insilo to your preferred language model. Any OpenAI-compatible endpoint works — the local Olares LiteLLM, your own Ollama server or an external provider. If you leave a field blank, Insilo uses the defaults baked into the deployment.
einstellungen.afterSave: Note: existing summaries are not regenerated. The new settings apply to future recordings and questions.
einstellungen.sectionLanguageHint: Choose the language Insilo uses to talk to you. Summaries are produced in this language too — even when the meeting was held in a different one.
einstellungen.sectionTemplatesHint: Each template defines via system prompt how the model structures the transcript. Adapt the prompts to your terminology — legal phrasing for client meetings, sales vocabulary for discovery calls. "Reset to default" returns to the factory template.
einstellungen.sectionSpeakersHint: People whose voice Insilo recognises. Once you assign a name to a voice in a transcript, the system learns the voice fingerprint — at the next meeting of the same person, the name appears automatically. All voice data stays on your Olares box; it never leaves the device.
einstellungen.sectionWebhooksHint: Let Insilo notify you when the status of a meeting changes — e.g. when a summary is ready. Insilo then sends a signed POST request to the configured URL. For meeting.ready the payload also contains the full meeting markdown.
einstellungen.sectionApiKeysHint: Keys allow external systems to read meetings via the REST API (/api/external/v1/meetings). Every key is scoped to your organisation — data leaves your box only where you hand over the key.

locale.switcherHint: Choose the language Insilo uses to talk to you.
locale.optionAutoHint: Insilo picks the language from your browser preferences.
locale.saveScopeOrg: Set as default for other members of this organisation
